text.title: CodeQL + Copilot Autofix Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to wire CodeQL + Copilot Autofix end-to-end.

step.name: confirm-eligibility
step.action: Verify GitHub-hosted, executable code present, GHAS or OSS license.
step.decision-gate: If any condition missing, STOP — methodology does not apply.

step.name: enable-code-scanning
step.action: Enable Code Scanning + Copilot Autofix in Security settings.

step.name: commit-workflow
step.action: Commit `codeql.yml` with push + pull_request triggers and a language matrix; for Bash/Docker/TF/PHP add AI detections lane.

step.name: branch-protection
step.action: Add `codeql-analyze` as a required status check; allow Autofix bot to push suggestion commits but not bypass review.
